title: T-047 — Pending Assignment Queue full page
prompt:
# T-047 — Pending Assignment Queue full page

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §17.1 PLE-004, §8.1 Zone D, §16.2 OQ-EXT-06.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Add the full-page deep-link version of the assignment review queue.

## Implementation contract
Use existing assignment actions, preserve run grouping, and ensure bulk operations emit the batched outbox event from T-017/T-029.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement /scheduler/pending full-page queue for draft/approved/rejected/overridden assignments.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches pext_pending_full_page and reuses approve/reject/override/bulk approve tasks. URL filters drive KPI drill-downs.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: View WO links and schedule field ownership.

acceptance_criteria: Given /scheduler/pending renders, then KPI tiles, filters, table, Approve All and per-row actions match pext_pending_full_page parity.
Given Approve All is used, then scope covers all completed runs with visible run grouping per OQ-EXT-06.
Given filters are changed, then URL state persists and export uses the same filter.

Given the UI task is closed, when CLOSEOUT is recorded, then it includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED RTL tests for filtering, run grouping, bulk action enablement.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not bulk approve hidden rows without showing scope.
Do not allow non-authorized roles to approve/reject.
Do not bypass T-014/T-017 server actions.
ui_closeout_evidence: Desktop screenshot/artifact of the implemented surface compared 1:1 to prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/optimizer-screens.jsx:4-110` (structural, visual, and interaction parity).
Playwright trace artifact for the primary happy path and at least one error/blocked/permission-denied path.
Axe (or equivalent) accessibility result, or a documented blocker with rationale.
List of intentional deviations from the prototype/UX with reason (e.g. P2 gating, RBAC hide).
Reference parity expectations in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and translation notes in `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-planning-ext.md`.
